summary: Frontend-only regression after Admin.jsx refactor (1853-line split into /pages/admin/* modules) and footer logo wiring. All 18 review-request scenarios verified end-to-end via Playwright against the public preview URL. Admin login, all 7 tabs, stats, leads panel + drawer, post editor + AI translate bar (EN/DE/ES), case-study editor (singular label confirmed), change-password dialog, forgot-password dialog, sign-out token cleanup, navbar/footer logo from site-settings, and all public pages all pass. Zero pageerror events. Backend already 40/40 in iteration_8 — not re-tested per request.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer's fetchSiteSettings runs on every footer mount (every public page navigation). Consider hoisting site-settings into a React context or SWR cache so we issue one /api/site-settings request per session instead of one per page. Currently low-impact since the request is small, but a minor optimization.

Admin.jsx auth shell stores the bearer token in localStorage (TOKEN_KEY='mir_admin_token'). XSS-readable; not a regression from this refactor but worth noting per the auth-testing playbook (httpOnly cookies preferred). Out of scope for this iteration.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing 29 leads, 0 published posts, 0 outstanding invoices.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor verified clean. Public preview URL: https://mir-consulting-next.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin route: /admin (password-only). Logo currently uploaded at /api/media/logos/Update-Gradient-Colors-Black-Red-Blue-735c96ee.png — both navbar (h-9 w-auto max-w-[140px] object-contain) and footer (h-10 w-auto max-w-[160px] object-contain) consume it via fetchSiteSettings. Stats showed 29 leads / 29 new / 0 posts / 0 invoices. Note: page.goto with wait_until='networkidle' on the homepage times out (likely a long-lived background poll/socket); use 'domcontentloaded' or 'load' instead.

detailed_results.admin_login: OK — token stored, dashboard rendered (data-testid admin-dashboard-page)
detailed_results.sign_out: Clears localStorage token and returns to login screen

rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no issues found in this regression.
